candidates.title: Packaging and Brand Production Designer
candidates.brief: Upwork · Fixed price Project Overview We have already completed the logo and colour direction for Oudi. What we now need is a packaging and brand production designer who can take our existing brand assets and turn them into a complete, print-ready system. This is not a fresh branding exercise. The logo is done. The layout and structure of the product packaging are already largely established. The main task is to apply the brand correctly, get the colour matching right, and prepare everything properly for print and production. Oudi is a medical-luxury brand sitting at the intersection of premium dermatology and cosmetic elegance. The look must feel calm, intelligent, restrained, and premium. The finished work should feel polished and production-ready, not experimental. What We Will Provide We will supply: 1. The final logo files 2. The logo in its approved colour variations 3. Pantone ref

candidates.title: Graphic Design (Web & Social Media)
candidates.brief: Upwork · Hourly Ceritide Research is seeking a skilled graphic designer to create clean, professional visual assets for our website, product listings, packaging, and digital marketing channels. Our industry is compliance‑sensitive, so attention to detail and a scientific, minimal aesthetic are essential. Shopify experience is a plus. Nice‑to‑Have -Experience in scientific, biotech, research, or technical branding -Understanding of brand consistency and marketing visuals -Ability to deliver editable templates -Long‑term availability for ongoing design work Project Type -Initial branding project with potential for ongoing work -Open to fixed‑price or hourly proposals Deliverables & Requirements -Editable source files (AI, PSD, INDD, Figma, etc.) -Print‑ready PDFs and web‑optimized exports -Editable Certificate of Analysis (COA) templates (PDF) -Vial labels must be clean, minimal, and regul

candidates.title: Marketing Collateral & Brand Assets
candidates.brief: Project Brief: Marketing Collateral & Brand Assets Deliverables: Branded Presentation Folder, One-Page Service Overview, and Branded Sample Case Notes Template. 1. Project Overview & Branding Guidelines The organization provides premier, high-quality case management services, with a significant focus on complex motor vehicle accident (MVA) cases. Our work is professional, meticulous, and deeply supportive. All design deliverables must reflect this premium standard. For branding reference, color palettes, typography, and visual tone, please utilize our website. The aesthetic should be clean, modern, trustworthy, and polished. 2. candidates.title: Marketing Collateral & Brand Assets (Legal / MVA Case Management)
candidates.meta: Upwork · Hourly $15–$100 · Posted ~2 hours ago · United States
candidates.brief: Project: Marketing Collateral & Brand Assets for a premium case-management firm focused on complex motor vehicle accident (MVA) cases; all deliverables must feel clean, modern, trustworthy and polished, referencing the website's palette/typography. DELIVERABLE 1 — Branded Two-Pocket Presentation Folder: standard 9"x12" with two interior pockets, right pocket with die-cut business-card slits; minimalist high-impact front cover with logo/brand colours/tagline; clean back cover with contact info; print-ready files (PDF/X-1a). candidates.title: Adobe InDesign Print Setup for Wedding Invitation
candidates.brief: Upwork · Hourly · Intermediate We are seeking a skilled freelancer to assist with the print setup of a 6-panel accordion fold wedding invitation using Adobe InDesign. The task involves ensuring the design is ready for print, including setting up bleed, trim, and fold lines. The ideal candidate will have experience in print design and layout, with a strong understanding of Adobe InDesign. This is a part-time project with a short duration, expected to be completed in less than a month. ⚠️ Adobe InDesign 2026 is required. Please do not apply if you work in Illustrator, Canva, or Photoshop. PROJECT DETAILS: - 6-panel accordion fold invitation — 3 panels per side - Each panel 6" wide × 8" tall, total flat size 18" × 8" - Front: continuous panoramic watercolor illustration spanning all 3 panels - Back: illustrated map of Bermuda with wedding itinerary spanning all 3 panels - Artwork provided a
